content: Why was story discussion a forum

There are way too many newbies asking questions in the general chat and it's getting annoying redirecting them all of the time.
Could you try swapping the order of morimens and general chat so the morimens could be on top of the list or changing the name of general chat to non-morimens chat?
I think just swapping the positions of the chats would fix the issue, since newbies would get put into that chat first.
